title: Hartmann's solution
body_html:
The RCEM syllabus expects candidates to know the relative compositions of Hartmann's and saline solutions.

Hartmann's contains:
  • 5 mmol/L of potassium ions
  • 29 mmol/L of lactate ions
  • 111 mmol/L of chloride ions
  • 131 mmol/L of sodium ions

Saline solution contains:
  • 154 mmol/L sodium
  • 154 mmol/L chloride
